title: HAVOP Shark Bedding Duvet Cover Set Single Size Kids Boys Sea Ocean Animal Print Quilt Cover Set Soft Comforter Cover Set All Season Bedding Set
features: High Quality Material: Made of super soft microfiber material, which is breathable, durable and skin-friendly. Easy care and wrinkle, fade, stain, shrink resistant.

Room Decor: This duvet cover is printed with baby shark designs, adds a sense of mysterious exploration. Perfect for decorating children's room. Good choice as a birthday gift or special holiday gift to your loved children, boys, girls, kids, toddlers, teen, good friends, family.
Package Include: 1 single size duvet cover (135×200 cm) + 1 pillowcase (50×75 cm). Please Note: There are no any COMFORTER/ QUILT/ INSERT in the set, its a DUVET COVER.

Easy Care: Machine wash separately in cold water, tumble dry on low with similar colors and low temperature iron when needed. We advise you wash the set and using fabric softener before first use, do not bleach.

Zipper Closure & Corner Ties: The invisible side zipper closure easily allows you to insert and remove your duvet. The four corner ties keep the duvet in place. Let you sleep peacefully & comfortably all night.
description: Product Description Shark Bedding Set Kids Boys Girls Duvet Cover Set High Quality Material: Made of super soft microfiber material, which is breathable, durable and skin-friendly. Perfect for decorating children's bedroom. Gift Idea: Good choice as a birthday gift or special holiday gift to your loved children, boys, girls, kids, toddlers, teen, good friends, family.
